hero.title: Trade wrapped BTH
hero.subtitle: wBTH is Botho wrapped 1:1 onto other chains so it can trade on their DEXs. This page lists where wBTH lives today and explains how to bridge BTH across.
hero.testnetNotice: Everything on this page is testnet. These tokens, pools, and addresses exist only on test networks and are not valid on mainnet.

peg.heading: Peg health
peg.subheading: Live proof-of-reserves: BTH locked in the bridge reserve versus wBTH minted across chains. Green means the peg is intact.

venues.heading: Where to trade
venues.subheading: Seeded wBTH pools across chains. Links open the venue in a new tab — Botho never brokers the swap.
venues.comingSoonNote: HIP-1 spot market is not live yet (pending #877).
venues.empty: No venues are configured for this network yet.

export.heading: How to bridge BTH → wBTH
export.intro: Exporting BTH locks it in the bridge reserve and mints an equal amount of wBTH on the destination chain. For Tier 0 this is a guided, manual flow — the integrated in-wallet version is coming next.

factor1.title: 1. Hold factor-1 BTH
factor1.body: Only factor-1 (zero-demurrage) BTH can be exported, so wrapped supply can never drift from the locked reserve.

lock.title: 2. Lock in the reserve
lock.body: Send the BTH to the bridge reserve. It stays locked 1:1 against every wBTH that gets minted.

mint.title: 3. Mint wBTH
mint.body: The bridge attests your deposit exactly once and mints an equal amount of wBTH to your address on the destination chain.

trade.title: 4. Trade wBTH
trade.body: Swap your wBTH on any venue above — or bring it back later when the Unwrap flow ships.

peg.title: 1:1 peg
peg.body: Every wBTH is backed by exactly one BTH locked in the reserve — no fractional backing.

exactlyOnce.title: Exactly-once
exactlyOnce.body: Each deposit mints wBTH once and only once; replays are rejected at multiple layers.

factorOne.title: Factor-1 only
factorOne.body: Exported BTH must be zero-demurrage, keeping wrapped supply exactly aligned with the reserve.

panel.title: Export BTH → wBTH
panel.subtitle: Build and submit the BTH deposit from this wallet. wBTH is minted to your own address on the destination chain — this wallet never signs on that chain.

notConfigured.title: Integrated export endpoint not wired yet
notConfigured.body: The in-wallet export flow is built and reuses your wallet's signing path, but the public bridge order API (create/status, CORS) is not exposed on this deployment yet. Follow the guided steps above in the meantime.

noWallet.title: Open your wallet to export
noWallet.body: Exporting builds and signs a BTH deposit from your wallet. Create or open your wallet first.

locked.title: Unlock your wallet to export
locked.body: Your wallet is locked. Unlock it to build and sign the BTH deposit.

form.chainHint: Where wBTH is minted — to your own wallet on that chain.
form.balanceUnknown: Unlock your wallet to see your balance.
form.factor1Notice: Only factor-1 (zero-demurrage) BTH can be exported (ADR 0003). The bridge verifies eligibility on deposit and mints only for factor-1 coins.
form.feePreview: A bridge fee is quoted when you create the order, and a BTH network fee applies to the deposit. You receive wBTH equal to your deposit minus the bridge fee.

status.expiredNote: This order expired before a confirmed deposit. Start a new export.

completed.title: wBTH minted to your wallet
completed.body: Your wBTH is now in your {{chain}} wallet.

error.generic: Something went wrong. Please try again.
